description: When initial concept hits satisfy when_matched_contains_all, append append_concepts (must exist in concepts.json). Expresses typical banking satellites and dependent facts not always named in a short scenario sentence.

rules.business_rationale: Structured case/ticket records (SLA, status) complement free-form interaction logs for CRM servicing and complaint handling.
Measured exposure is only appended when both obligor and facility are present, reducing single-keyword credit over-inference.
Orders are intent; fills/executions are market facts. Schema completeness usually requires both for brokerage and best-execution audit.
Position state is appended only after full account-order-execution chain is present.
When both party master and bank staff exist in scope, RM coverage is usually modeled as an assignment row (primary/secondary RM), not only embedded text on the customer.
AUM/holding lines for private banking stories attach to accounts and products; positions are separate facts from account balance snapshots.
CDD/EDD cases in regulated CRM typically pair with consent and purpose-of-use records for GDPR/privacy programs.
Consent changes are auditable events; an immutable audit row store supports lineage queries alongside consent snapshots.
Pipeline plus onboarded account (deepening stage) typically carries RM tasks and tier entitlements in private banking CRM.
Screening outcomes in AML programs often feed STR/large-txn regulatory submissions as separate submission rows.
Facility utilization is captured as drawdown events once exposure tracking exists.
Repayment events complement drawdown lifecycle to support balance replay.
Instrument master in scope usually needs at least one quote snapshot for valuation linkage.
Curve points are added after instrument and quote context to keep instrument inference incremental.
Instrument master records typically require calendar linkage for trading and settlement day semantics.
Corporate action events are modeled after instrument and calendar context are established.
Ladder points are appended when funding deals are in scope together with FTP context, reducing broad treasury auto-expansion.
Liquidity monitoring snapshots are built on top of ladderized cashflow points.
Transfer-pricing curve context is tied to underlying treasury funding deals.
Liquidity metric snapshots commonly map to HQLA inventory details for governance views.
Funding concentration monitoring is appended when core funding and FTP context are both present.
